title: chromolaena ivifolia
intro: Chromolaena ivifolia, also known as Lantana or White Snakeroot, is a plant species in the family Asteraceae. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. Its health benefits include relief from fever, headache, and skin conditions, as well as the treatment of respiratory issues and digestive problems. Chromolaena ivifolia can be prepared as a tea, infused oil, or tincture, and is also used in various herbal preparations, such as poultices and salves, to harness its medicinal properties.
